Metadata.title: EchoVoyage
Metadata.description: Turn language materials into memory journeys.

HomePage.title: Turn language into a memory voyage.
HomePage.description: Paste a corpus you care about. Choose a companion. Travel through its words, scenes, expressions, and echoes until the text becomes part of your memory.
HomePage.footer: EchoVoyage Day 2 is a static web prototype. LLM generation, SQLite persistence, and real memory updates are intentionally out of scope.

CorpusInput.heading: Paste a text you want to travel through
CorpusInput.rawPlaceholder: Paste a lyric, speech, dialogue, essay, subtitle, poem, or any meaningful text.
CorpusInput.note: Static preview only. Generation is not connected yet.

gentle-guide.name: Gentle Guide
gentle-guide.description: Soft feedback, patient hints, and slow returns.

strict-mentor.name: Strict Mentor
strict-mentor.description: Sharper corrections and a clear path to mastery.

mischievous-bard.name: Mischievous Bard
mischievous-bard.description: Playful scenes, surprising prompts, and story turns.

brave-companion.name: Brave Companion
brave-companion.description: Adventure language for learners who like momentum.

silent-scholar.name: Silent Scholar
silent-scholar.description: Minimal words, careful notes, and quiet precision.

TrainingScene.description: A Day 2 static roleplay preview. Real answer checking and Agent feedback arrive later.

MemoryStats.heading: Places waiting for a return.
MemoryStats.description: Memory is a trail. EchoVoyage will eventually bring back landmarks as they begin to fade.
MemoryStats.masteryNote: Static preview score for the first voyage.
MemoryStats.echoesNote: Landmarks scheduled for a future revisit.
